stemHtml:
Refer to E(LO)2 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Given the following information, what is the aircraft’s position, if both DME ranges are decreasing?

ST ABBS (SAB) VOR/DME (55°54’N, 002°12W’), range: 81 NM
TURNBERRY (TRN) VOR/DME (55°19’N, 004°47’W), range: 38 NM
Aircraft’s track: 155°(T)
Slant range correction should be ignored.
